content: browser-image-compression 2.0.2 auto-detects EXIF orientation and rotates the canvas to match before compressing (phones record landscape pixels with an EXIF flag instead of rotating the bitmap). Default behavior fixes rotation automatically; exifOrientation option (1-8) can override, and preserveExif:true copies the original EXIF block into the compressed JPEG (not WebP) if downstream tools need camera metadata. For product photos we want auto-correction (default) with preserveExif left false/default to strip metadata (privacy + smaller size).
